site_node.name: Site Node
site_node.description: Site-level UNS node within an enterprise

data_leaf.name: Data Leaf Node
data_leaf.description: Leaf node linked to a database table

fields.name: name
fields.label: Name
fields.description: Display name for this UNS node

fields.name: uns_level
fields.label: UNS Level
fields.description: Level in the UNS hierarchy — pick a standard level or type your own

fields.name: description
fields.label: Description
fields.description: Human-readable description of this UNS node

fields.name: isa95
fields.label: ISA-95 Metadata
fields.description: Optional ISA-95 classification for this node

fields.name: level
fields.label: ISA-95 Level
fields.description: ISA-95 hierarchy level (L0=Process, L1=Control, L2=WorkCenter, L3=Site, L4=Enterprise)

fields.name: entity
fields.label: Entity Type
fields.description: ISA-95 entity type (e.g. Control Module, Work Center, Enterprise)

fields.name: dbms
fields.label: Database
fields.description: Database name this node maps to (leaf nodes only)

fields.name: table
fields.label: Table
fields.description: Table name this node maps to (leaf nodes only)

fields.name: where
fields.label: Where Clause
fields.description: Filter condition for table data (e.g. side='DLT')

fields.name: parent
fields.label: Parent ID
fields.description: ID of the parent UNS node in the hierarchy

fields.name: ledger
fields.label: Ledger
fields.description: Blockchain ledger scope for this policy
